name: glances
description: Glances an Eye on your system. A top/htop alternative for GNU/Linux, BSD, Mac OS and Windows operating systems.
readme_summary: Glances is an open-source, cross-platform system monitoring tool written in Python. It provides real-time insights into CPU, memory, disk, network, processes, and container usage, with a user-friendly dashboard. It supports remote monitoring via a web interface, CLI, and RESTful API, and can export data to various formats or databases.
key_features: Cross-platform system monitoring (Linux, BSD, macOS, Windows)
Real-time monitoring of CPU, memory, disk, network, processes, etc.
Data export to files, databases, CSV, STDOUT
primary_use_case: Real-time system performance monitoring and resource utilization analysis across multiple operating systems, accessible via terminal, web UI, or API.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old owl, representing Glances, perched on a branch overlooking a bustling, vibrant city. The city's buildings are stylized as interconnected servers and data centers, with glowing lines representing network traffic and energy flow. The owl's eyes are large, clear lenses that project holographic displays showing real-time data streams: CPU usage as a pulsing heart, memory as flowing water, disk activity as spinning gears, and network traffic as streaks of light. Subtle digital particles emanate from the owl, symbolizing its monitoring capabilities. The scene is set at dusk, with a warm, inviting glow from the city and a clear, starry sky above. The art style is a 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clear iconography and a clean, modern aesthetic.

name: luna
readme_summary: Luna is a self-hosted calendar aggregator and frontend application that consolidates calendars from various protocols like CalDav, iCal, and Google Calendar into a single, customizable web interface. It offers extensive theming options and user management, aiming to provide a unified and personalized calendar experience.
key_features: Calendar aggregation from CalDav, iCal, Google Calendar
Built-in themes and easy installation of custom themes/fonts
primary_use_case: To provide a unified, customizable, and self-hosted interface for aggregating and viewing multiple digital calendars.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old librarian meticulously organizing and displaying an infinite array of colorful, glowing scrolls (representing different calendars) onto a grand, ornate bookshelf. Each scroll is labeled with a different protocol icon (CalDav, iCal, Google Calendar). The librarian is adjusting a large, central clock face that displays a unified, beautifully themed calendar. Subtle digital particles flow from the scrolls to the central clock. The scene is set in a cozy, well-lit library with a touch of modern UI elements visible on a nearby desk. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a warm, inviting color palette, emphasizing clarity and organization.

name: ai-file-sorter
description: Cross-platform desktop application for content-aware file organization and renaming. Supports local and remote LLMs, preview-based workflows, and fully user-controlled changes.
readme_summary: AI File Sorter is a cross-platform desktop application that leverages AI to intelligently organize and rename files like images, documents, and media. It offers a privacy-first approach by supporting local LLMs and providing preview-based workflows for user-controlled file management.
key_features: Supports local and remote LLMs (e.g., Llama 3B, Mistral 7B)
Automatic folder creation and file sorting
Privacy-first design with local processing options
Analyzes image content, document text, and media metadata
primary_use_case: Intelligent, AI-powered organization and renaming of digital files on a desktop.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, anthropomorphic filing cabinet with a glowing AI brain, actively sorting and renaming scattered digital files (represented as colorful, distinct icons like photos, documents, and music notes) into neat, labeled drawers. The cabinet is in a clean, modern office setting. Subtle holographic projections around it display file previews and suggested new names. Small, stylized code snippets float in the background. The AI File Sorter logo is subtly integrated on the cabinet. The overall mood is organized and efficient, with a soft, digital glow. Style: 3D isometric illustration with clean lines and a bright, approachable color palette.

name: phantom
description: An AI co-worker with its own computer. Self-evolving, persistent memory, MCP server, secure credential collection, email identity. Built on the Claude Agent SDK.
readme_summary: Phantom is an AI co-worker designed to be persistent and self-evolving, acting as an independent agent with its own dedicated computing environment. It goes beyond typical chatbots by installing software, managing data, and building infrastructure autonomously, improving its capabilities over time.
key_features: Autonomous software installation and infrastructure building
Multiple communication channels (Slack, Email, Web Chat, Discord, etc.)
primary_use_case: To provide a persistent, autonomous AI co-worker that can independently manage tasks, build tools, and evolve its capabilities within its own dedicated environment, freeing up user resources.
cover_image_prompt: A 3D isometric illustration of a diligent, anthropomorphic robot diligently working in its own futuristic workshop, which is filled with glowing tools, data streams, and self-built machinery. The robot is shown assembling a complex structure from digital blocks, with one hand holding a blueprint and the other interacting with a holographic interface displaying code snippets and evolving graphs. Subtle elements like a Slack icon and an email symbol are integrated into the workshop's design. The overall mood is one of industrious autonomy and continuous self-improvement, with a clean, bright color palette and a focus on the robot's independent productivity. The repository name 'Phantom' is subtly etched onto a piece of machinery.

name: claw-code
description: The repo is finally unlocked. enjoy the party! The fastest repo in history to surpass 100K stars ⭐. Join Discord: https://discord.gg/5TUQKqFWd Built in Rust using oh-my-codex.
readme_summary: Claw Code is a Rust implementation of the `claw` CLI agent harness, designed to provide a command-line interface for interacting with AI agents. It focuses on building and running these agents, with features for managing sessions, authentication, and checking system parity.
key_features: Rust implementation of `claw` CLI agent harness
Command-line interface for AI agent interaction
Companion Python workspace for reference and auditing
primary_use_case: To provide a robust and efficient command-line interface for developers to build, manage, and interact with AI agents using Rust.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled artisan, dressed in a modern workshop, meticulously crafting a complex, glowing mechanical bird (representing an AI agent) from raw metallic components and streams of digital data. The artisan uses specialized tools that project holographic blueprints and code snippets. The bird is shown mid-creation, with one wing fully formed and emitting soft light, while the other is still being assembled. In the background, a large, stylized 'CLAW' symbol is subtly integrated into the workshop's machinery, with clean lines and a futuristic, yet grounded aesthetic. The scene should be a 3D isometric illustration with a focus on intricate detail and a cool, focused color palette, emphasizing precision and creation.
